resolvedQuestions.text: Which canonical representation and adapters should v1 use?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Structured token model with sections[], fidelity scoring, format-specific adapters

resolvedQuestions.text: Which diff algorithms best suppress conversion noise?
resolvedQuestions.answer: jsdiff Myers algorithm for v1 core; histogram as v2 upgrade path for move detection

resolvedQuestions.text: Which snapshot lifecycle is safe and predictable?
resolvedQuestions.answer: SHA-256 content-addressed, 30-day LRU retention, atomic write+rename, explicit-pair fallback

resolvedQuestions.text: How should the HTML report expose fidelity and risk?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Self-contained dual-mode HTML, CSP script-src none, fidelity dashboard, keyboard navigation, ARIA labels

resolvedQuestions.text: Which portable core and skill interface should be implemented?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Two-layer: npm doc-diff-core (TypeScript API) + OpenCode skill wrapper; full CLI contract

resolvedQuestions.text: What format support matrix is realistic for v1?
resolvedQuestions.answer: 4 tiers: Full (txt, md), Limited (html), Adapter (docx, text-pdf), Unsupported (scanned-pdf, binary)

resolvedQuestions.text: Which existing libraries provide authoritative evidence?
resolvedQuestions.answer: diff+mammoth+cheerio+remark+pdf-parse; all BSD/MIT licensed, actively maintained

keyFindings.text: Complete v1 technology stack: diff (95M/wk), mammoth (5.2M/wk), cheerio (1.8M dependents), remark (3.7M/wk)
Canonical document model: sections[] with headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, links; per-construct fidelity scoring
Snapshot system: SHA-256 content-addressed, 30-day LRU, atomic writes, 0600 permissions, explicit-pair fallback
HTML report: self-contained, CSP-hardened, side-by-side+unified modes, fidelity dashboard, keyboard-accessible
Two-layer architecture: portable npm core (deterministic) + OpenCode skill wrapper (orchestration)
7 formats across 4 tiers: Full (txt 100%, md 95%), Limited (html 80%), Adapter (docx 60%, pdf 50%), Unsupported (scanned, binary)
15 threat vectors catalogued with severity ratings and mitigations; all 5 core deps permissively licensed
~33 fixture pairs, 6 quantitative metrics (95% detection, ≤5% false positive, ≤5s for 100KB), cross-platform CI
8 identified gaps with confidence ratings; 6 carried-forward questions for v2

ruledOutDirections.approach: Custom markdown parser instead of remark/mdast
